revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24699703697|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Hahaki-jinja]][[ja:波波伎神社]] {{Expand Japanese|波波伎神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hahaki Shrine | native_name = 波波伎神社 | image = Hahaki Jinja 11.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hahaki Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.465251|133.854114}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Kotoshironushi|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|en|Kotoshironushi|fa|کوتوشیرونوشی|fr|Kotoshironushi|ja|事代主|ko|고토시로누시|ru|Котосиронуси|simple|Kotoshironushi|th|โคโตชิโรนูชิ|zh|事代主神|qid=Q8009611|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} }} {{nihongo|'''Hahaki Shrine'''|波波伎神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hōki Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province|ja|伯耆国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11381490|1=List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province}} ** Series ordinal: 2 ** P155: {{ill|Q245734|ltq=Q245734|qid=Q245734|1=Shitori Shrine (Tottori)}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135040758|ltq=Q135040758|qid=Q135040758|1=Shitorino Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Kurayoshi, Tottori|lt=Kurayoshi|ar|كورايوشي (توتوري)|azb|کورایوشی، توتوری|ca|Kurayoshi|ceb|Kurayoshi|ce|Кураёси|cs|Kurajoši (Tottori)|de|Kurayoshi|en|Kurayoshi, Tottori|envoyage|Kurayoshi|es|Kurayoshi (Tottori)|et|Kurayoshi|fa|کورایوشی، توتوری|fi|Kurayoshi|fr|Kurayoshi|gl|Kurayoshi|id|Kurayoshi, Tottori|it|Kurayoshi|ja|倉吉市|ko|구라요시시|lt|Kurajošis|mg|Kurayoshi|mzn|کورایوشی، توتوری|nl|Kurayoshi|pl|Kurayoshi|pt|Kurayoshi|ro|Kurayoshi|ru|Кураёси|sv|Kurayoshi|tg|Кураёши|tl|Kurayosyi, Tottori|tok|ma tomo Kulajosi|tr|Kurayoshi|tt|Кураёси|tum|Kurayoshi|uk|Курайоші|vi|Kurayoshi, Tottori|war|Kurayoshi, Tottori|zh_classical|倉吉市|zh_min_nan|Kurayosi-chhī|zh_yue|倉吉|zh|倉吉市|qid=Q642006|1=Kurayoshi, Tottori}} * {{ill|Q1053703|ltq=Q1053703|qid=Q1053703|1=Hōki Province}} * {{ill|Kawamura district|lt=Kawamura district|ja|河村郡|pl|Powiat Kawamura|zh|河村郡|qid=Q11142103|1=Kawamura district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.465251|133.854114}} == image (P18) == * Hahaki Jinja 11.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Kotoshironushi|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|en|Kotoshironushi|fa|کوتوشیرونوشی|fr|Kotoshironushi|ja|事代主|ko|고토시로누시|ru|Котосиронуси|simple|Kotoshironushi|th|โคโตชิโรนูชิ|zh|事代主神|qid=Q8009611|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 182770 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226|1=Ken-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11504610|ltq=Q11504610|qid=Q11504610|1=Unranked}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q11123280|ltq=Q11123280|qid=Q11123280|1=Senior Fifth Rank}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8270005004383 == Commons category (P373) == * Hahaki-jinja == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '鳥取県倉吉市福庭654', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Hahaki-jinja}} [[JA:波波伎神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11555561}} == Japanese content == {{?? |?? = Hahaki Shrine |??=[[File:Hahaki-jinja, haiden-3.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |??? = {{ill|lt=Tottori Prefecture|Q133935|qid=Q133935|1=Tottori Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kurayoshi|Q642006|qid=Q642006|1=Kurayoshi, Tottori}} Fukuba 654 |?? = {{?????2????|35|27|55.1|N|133|51|15.1|E|region:JP-31_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=?????}} |?? = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Yae Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |?? = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}?former {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=Ken-sha}} |?? = |?? = |?? = |?? = October 13 |?? = |?? = {{Location map|Japan Tottori|label=?????|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Hahaki-jinja, torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Hahaki Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Fukuba, {{ill|lt=Kurayoshi|Q642006|qid=Q642006|1=Kurayoshi, Tottori}}, {{ill|lt=Tottori Prefecture|Q133935|qid=Q133935|1=Tottori Prefecture}}. It is an Engishiki-listed shrine and its former shrine rank was {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=Ken-sha}}. It enshrines {{ill|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|lt=Yae Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{ill|lt=Amenowakahiko|Q10940674|qid=Q10940674|lt=Ame-no-Wakahiko-no-Kami|1=Ame no Wakahiko}}, {{ill|lt=Shitateruhime|Q11307233|qid=Q11307233|lt=Shitateruhime-no-Kami|1=Shitateruhime}}, {{ill|lt=Sukunabikona|Q3275687|qid=Q3275687|lt=Sukunabikona-no-Kami|1=Sukunabikona}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata-no-Kami|1=Takeminakata}}, {{ill|lt=Ajisukitakahikone|Q506610|qid=Q506610|lt=Ajisukitakahikone-no-Mikoto|1=Ajisukitakahikone}}, {{ill|lt=Ichikishimahime|Q11059454|qid=Q11059454|qid=Q11059454|lt=Ichikishimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Ichikishima-hime}}, {{ill|lt=Takiribime|Q10932870|qid=Q10932870|lt=Takiribime-no-Mikoto|1=Tagorihime}}, and {{ill|lt=Tagitsuhime|Q10932592|qid=Q10932592|lt=Tagitsuhime-no-Mikoto|1=Tagitsuhime}}. === History === Its founding period is unclear. The shrine buildings were rebuilt in 1877. In 1916, it merged with {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kaita Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}. === Precincts === The sacred grove is a primeval forest of giant {{ill|lt=Castanopsis sieboldii|Q846994|qid=Q846994|1=Castanopsis sieboldii}} and {{ill|lt=Machilus thunbergii|Q5792073|qid=Q5792073|1=Machilus thunbergii}} trees, with many native camellias. It was designated a natural monument in 1934. Behind the shrine is the round burial mound called {{ill|lt=Fukuba Kofun|Q63253438|qid=Q63253438|1=Fukuba Kofun}}, considered from the late Kofun period. It was designated a Tottori Prefecture historic site in 1956. Hahaki-jinja, honden.jpg|Main hall Hahaki-jinja, haiden-2.jpg|Worship hall Fukuba Kofun, entrance-2.jpg|{{ill|lt=Fukuba Kofun|Q63253438|qid=Q63253438|1=Fukuba Kofun}} === Cultural properties === === National Natural Monument === * Hahaki Shrine sacred grove - designated May 1, 1934{{?????????????|401|2112|???????}}. === Tottori Prefecture Designated Cultural Property === * Historic site ** {{ill|lt=Fukuba Kofun|Q63253438|qid=Q63253438|1=Fukuba Kofun}} - designated May 30, 1956[http://db.pref.tottori.jp/bunkazainavi.nsf/bunkazai_web_view/A4631429E576F3D44925796F0007FE5C?OpenDocument Fukuba Kofun] (Tottori Prefecture "Tottori Cultural Property Navi").. === Notes === {{?????}} {{reflist}} === See also === {{Commonscat|Hahaki-jinja}} * {{ill|lt=H?ki Province|Q1053703|qid=Q1053703|1=Hōki Province}} {{shinto-stub}} {{????????????? |header= |redirect= ??????? |1= ??????? |2= ??????????????? }} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hahaki Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hahaki Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tottori Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Kurayoshi]] [[Category:Municipal History of Kurayoshi]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]] [[Category:鳥取県の旧県社]][[Category:Shinto shrines in Tottori Prefecture]]
